decks.notes: This deck is focused on quickly assembling the Allosaurus Combo, which involves using cards like Allosaurus Rider, Neoform, and Eldritch Evolution to bring out powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck also includes cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect the combo and disrupt opponent's strategies. Additionally, cards like Endurance and Consign to Memory provide utility and flexibility in various situations. Overall, the strategy is to efficiently combo off and overwhelm opponents with big creatures while maintaining control of the game.

This deck utilizes aggressive creatures combined with disruptive spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. By utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury, the deck looks to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize. Cards like Galvanic Discharge and Quantum Riddler provide removal and disruption, while cards like Consign to Memory and Wrath of the Skies help deal with threats on the board. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes cards that deal direct damage to the opponent or their creatures, while also having a strong creature base to apply pressure. The deck aims to win quickly by efficiently utilizing its resources and maintaining a presence on the battlefield. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury enhance the aggressive nature of the deck, making it a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 matchups.

This UW Control deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. By utilizing cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Orim's Chant to stall opponents, along with Supreme Verdict and Solitude for removal, the deck aims to maintain board control while drawing cards with Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Consult the Star Charts. The inclusion of Isochron Scepter adds an additional layer of control, allowing the player to repeatedly cast key spells. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of lands to support its mana requirements and ensure consistency in its control strategy.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to deal fast damage to the opponent. The deck also includes powerful spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to control the board and protect your creatures. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer provide additional value by generating tokens and card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, aggressive strategy while also maintaining some control elements to help secure victory.

This deck focuses on using efficient land ramp and combo pieces to quickly assemble the Amulet Titan, allowing for explosive plays and fast mana generation. With cards like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift, the deck aims to quickly fetch key lands and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and mana sources. The combination of Amulet of Vigor, bounce lands, and utility lands like Vesuva and Mirrorpool create a strong engine for generating massive amounts of mana and overwhelming the opponent with big threats.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Amulet of Vigor and Arboreal Grazer to cast Primeval Titan and search for lands like Vesuva and Tolaria West. The goal is to create a powerful board state with multiple lands in play, allowing for combo finishes with cards like Scapeshift and Lotus Field to quickly ramp up mana and overwhelm the opponent. Key cards like Urza's Saga and Aftermath Analyst help to generate additional value and card advantage to ensure the deck can consistently execute its game plan.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Amulet of Vigor to accelerate mana production and consistently tutor for key combo pieces like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift. The deck leverages lands like Gruul Turf and Simic Growth Chamber to generate extra mana, while also incorporating utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Tolaria West to protect key spells. By efficiently ramping into powerful threats like Primeval Titan and utilizing land combos to generate lethal amounts of damage, this deck looks to overwhelm opponents and secure victory through explosive combos and strategic land manipulation.

This Modern deck focuses on aggressive plays and leveraging the multicolored nature of the cards for maximum impact on the battlefield. By using a combination of creatures with powerful abilities and versatile spells such as Lightning Bolt and Tribal Flames, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The key strength lies in the synergy between the creatures and spells, as well as the ability to consistently apply pressure through aggressive plays. Additionally, the mana base allows for flexibility in casting spells of different colors, further enhancing the deck's versatility.

The deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with low-cost artifacts and creatures, leveraging the synergies between them to overwhelm the opponent. Emry, Lurker of the Loch acts as a versatile source of card advantage and recursion, while cards like Mox Opal and Engineered Explosives help to accelerate gameplay and control the board. Urza's Saga provides additional utility by fetching key artifacts, enhancing the deck's aggressive strategy. This deck aims to outpace the opponent with a combination of efficient plays and explosive finishes, capitalizing on the powerful interactions within an artifact-heavy shell.

This deck focuses on generating mana quickly and efficiently through various spells and abilities to cast a game-ending spell like Goblin Charbelcher. It has a control aspect with counterspells and removal to disrupt opponents' game plans. The deck has no lands, relying on alternative methods to generate mana and draw cards. By utilizing a "landless" strategy, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its combo potential while maintaining a level of control over the game. The key strategy is to quickly assemble the necessary pieces to execute the combo while disrupting opponents' strategies.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to pressure the opponent and deal damage quickly. The deck includes burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm for additional reach and removal, while also utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory for buffs and combat tricks. The deck aims to maintain board presence and apply pressure early in the game, overwhelming the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on playing efficient creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to quickly pressure the opponent. It also utilizes Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding to protect its creatures and disrupt opponent's strategies. The deck includes some removal options like Lightning Bolt and Prismatic Ending to deal with threats. Additionally, cards like Arena of Glory and Consign to Memory provide additional utility and card advantage. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan while also allowing for some flexibility in casting spells of different colors.

This deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate, while protecting the combo with counterspells like Force of Negation. Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Quantum Riddler provide additional value and card advantage. The mana base is carefully constructed to enable the combo while also providing consistency. The goal is to set up a fast and efficient win condition through a combination of reanimation, protection, and card advantage to overwhelm the opponent in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on using Goryo's Vengeance to reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand while utilizing instant spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to control the board. Atraxa, Grand Unifier helps support the combo strategy by providing additional value through its abilities. Thoughtseize and Force of Negation help disrupt opponents' strategies, while Faithful Mending and Teferi, Time Raveler provide card draw and tempo advantage. Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog offer additional utility and synergy with the deck's reanimation theme. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm opponents with powerful threats.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to create a fast-paced, aggressive strategy by utilizing powerful creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and finish them off before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory to provide additional support and flexibility in combat situations.
